query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, gm.id as mandate_row_id, gm.mandateId, gm.billingRequestId, gm.status as mandate_status, gm.preferredPaymentDay, gm.joiningFeePaidAt, acp.membershipTier, acp.agentStatus
FROM users u
JOIN gc_mandates gm ON gm.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'naomigib@sky.com';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, gm.id as mandate_row_id, gm.mandateId, gm.billingRequestId, gm.status as mandate_status, gm.preferredPaymentDay, gm.joiningFeePaidAt, acp.membershipTier, acp.agentStatus
FROM users u
JOIN gc_mandates gm ON gm.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'naomigib@sky.com';
